description: Build the complete V2 UI - all pages, components, and navigation for a khmer24-style classified ads marketplace. This is the main implementation feature that creates all user-facing pages with empty states (no fake data), working navigation, and functional buttons.
steps: 1. Create src/components/layout/header.tsx (V2): Replace luxury header with marketplace header. Include: Logo (KhmerStore), prominent search bar (centered, like khmer24), Categories dropdown button (opens a dropdown/sheet with all 9 categories and subcategories), 'Post Listing' button (gold, links to /post), User menu (Sign In link when not auth'd, avatar dropdown when auth'd linking to /dashboard, /messages, Sign Out). Make header responsive - on mobile, search bar collapses to icon.

2. Create src/components/layout/footer.tsx (V2): Clean footer with columns: Platform (About, How it Works), Support (Contact, Safety Tips, FAQ), Legal (Terms, Privacy Policy), Community (Blog). All links point to real pages. Include social icons (Facebook, Telegram - common in Cambodia). Copyright line.

3. Create src/components/layout/mobile-nav.tsx (V2): Fixed bottom navigation bar visible only on mobile (md:hidden). 5 tabs: Home (/), Browse (/marketplace), Post (/post) - center button with gold accent, Messages (/messages), Profile (/dashboard). Each with lucide icon and label. Active state indicator.

4. Create src/components/shared/empty-state.tsx: Reusable empty state component accepting: icon (lucide icon component), title, description, actionLabel, actionHref. Renders a centered card with the icon in a circle, text, and optional CTA button linking to actionHref. Used throughout the app where no data exists.

5. Create src/components/shared/listing-card.tsx: Card component for listing items. Shows: placeholder image area (gray bg with Package icon when no image), title, price (formatted with $ or 'Free'), location badge, time ago text, condition badge (New/Used). The entire card is a Link to /listing/[id]. No fake data - this component is only rendered when real listings exist.

6. Create src/components/shared/category-card.tsx: Card for displaying a category. Shows: lucide icon (large), category name, listing count (from Supabase or '0 listings'). Links to /category/[slug]. Used on homepage and category browse page.

7. Create src/components/shared/search-bar.tsx: Standalone search component with: text input, category dropdown select, location dropdown select (Phnom Penh, Siem Reap, Battambang, etc.), Search button. On submit, navigates to /marketplace?q=...&category=...&location=... Works as a form (no JS required for basic function).

8. Rewrite src/app/page.tsx (Homepage V2): Structure: Hero section (large search bar on gradient background, tagline 'Buy & Sell Anything in Cambodia', subtitle with key stats placeholder 'Join thousands of buyers and sellers'), Categories grid section (3x3 grid of category cards using src/constants/categories.ts, each linking to /category/[slug]), How It Works section (3 steps: Post your listing, Get contacted, Make the deal - with icons), Featured Listings section (checks Supabase, shows empty state with 'No featured listings yet. Post the first one!' and CTA button to /post), CTA banner ('Ready to sell? Post your first listing for free' with button).

9. Create src/app/marketplace/page.tsx (V2 Browse/Search): Top area with breadcrumbs and active search bar (pre-filled from URL params). Left sidebar (desktop) with filters: Category checkboxes, Price range (min/max inputs), Condition (New/Used/All radio), Location select, Sort by (Newest/Price low-high/Price high-low). Main area: Shows listing results grid if Supabase configured and has data, otherwise shows empty state: 'No listings found' with CTA. Mobile: filters in a Sheet triggered by filter icon button. No fake data whatsoever.

10. Create src/app/category/[slug]/page.tsx: Dynamic category page. Gets slug from params, looks up category in constants/categories.ts to get name and icon. Shows: category header with icon and name, subcategory chips/tabs if subcategories exist, listing grid (fetches from Supabase filtered by category, or shows empty state). Page title uses category name.

11. Create src/app/post/page.tsx (Post a Listing): Full listing creation form. Fields: Title (text input, required), Category (select from categories constant), Subcategory (select, shows after category chosen), Price (number input with currency selector USD/KHR), Condition (New/Used select), Location (select: Phnom Penh, Siem Reap, Battambang, Kampong Cham, etc.), Description (textarea), Contact Phone (tel input), Photos (file upload area with drag-and-drop UI, shows up to 8 slots, client-side preview). Submit button. If not authenticated (no Supabase), show message 'Sign in to post a listing' with link to /sign-in. Form validates client-side. On submit: if Supabase configured, insert to database; if not, show toast 'Database not connected. Configure Supabase to enable posting.'

12. Rewrite src/app/(auth)/sign-in/page.tsx and sign-in form: Keep the existing sign-in form structure (email/password) but update copy to marketplace style instead of 'luxury'. Remove phone OTP section for now. If Supabase not configured, show a notice banner: 'Authentication requires database setup. Configure Supabase environment variables to enable sign-in.' The form should still render and show a friendly error if submitted without Supabase.
13. Rewrite src/app/(auth)/sign-up/page.tsx and sign-up form: Similar to sign-in. Fields: Display Name, Email, Password, Confirm Password. Same Supabase graceful fallback pattern.

14. Create src/app/dashboard/page.tsx (V2 User Dashboard): Shows user's own listings (empty state if none), quick stats (My Listings: 0, Messages: 0, Favorites: 0), and quick action buttons (Post New Listing, Browse Marketplace). Has a simple sidebar/tabs: My Listings, Favorites, Settings. If not authenticated, redirect to sign-in (handled by middleware).
15. Create src/app/dashboard/settings/page.tsx: Profile settings form with: Display Name, Phone, Location, Bio/About fields. Save button (saves to Supabase or shows toast if not configured).

16. Create src/app/messages/page.tsx: Messages/inbox page. Shows empty state: 'No messages yet. Messages will appear here when buyers contact you about your listings.' In future, this would list conversations.

17. Create src/app/about/page.tsx: Simple about page. Title: 'About Khmer Store'. Content: Describe the platform as Cambodia's marketplace for buying and selling. Mission, how it works, team section (generic - 'Our Team' with placeholder for team info). No fake data.

18. Create src/app/contact/page.tsx: Contact page with: contact form (Name, Email, Subject, Message fields + Submit button), contact info section (Email: support@khmerstore.com, Address: Phnom Penh, Cambodia), office hours. Form shows toast on submit.

19. Create src/app/terms/page.tsx and src/app/privacy/page.tsx: Simple legal pages with placeholder legal text (clearly marked as template: 'These terms will be updated...'). Proper headings and structure.

20. Update src/app/layout.tsx: Keep ThemeProvider, Header, Footer. Add the MobileNav component (bottom bar). Ensure proper structure with main content area that has padding-bottom on mobile for the bottom nav.

21. Delete all remaining V1 files that are no longer used: src/components/sections/ (hero-section.tsx, featured-products.tsx, featured-categories.tsx, trust-section.tsx, cta-section.tsx), src/features/marketplace/components/ (old files: product-grid.tsx, filter-sidebar.tsx, search-overlay.tsx, image-gallery.tsx, product-detail.tsx, review-section.tsx), src/features/dashboard/components/ (old files: dashboard-stats.tsx, orders-table.tsx, notifications-panel.tsx, dashboard-sidebar.tsx, seller-product-form.tsx, wallet-ui.tsx), src/components/marketplace/product-card.tsx (replaced by shared/listing-card.tsx), src/app/marketplace/[productId]/ (no product detail in V2 - listings use /listing/[id]), src/app/dashboard/products/ (replaced by dashboard listings).

22. Create src/app/listing/[id]/page.tsx: Listing detail page. Shows: image gallery area (empty placeholder if no images), title, price, location, posted date, condition, seller info card (name, member since, contact button), description, 'Contact Seller' button (opens messages or shows phone). If listing not found (Supabase not configured), show empty state.
23. Ensure every Link in Header, Footer, MobileNav, and all pages points to a route that has a real page.tsx file. No dead links anywhere.
24. Create a toast/notification system using the existing toast component at src/components/ui/toast.tsx - add a Toaster provider in layout and a useToast hook so buttons can show feedback.
acceptance_criteria: Homepage renders with search bar, category grid, how-it-works section, and empty featured section
All 9 category cards on homepage link to /category/[slug] pages that render
Marketplace browse page renders with search, filters sidebar, and empty state
Post listing page renders with complete form (title, category, price, location, description, photos)
Sign in and sign up pages render with forms and graceful Supabase fallback messages
Dashboard page renders with empty listings state and navigation
About, Contact, Terms, Privacy pages all render with content
Messages page renders with empty state
Header has working nav links: logo->/, search, categories dropdown, Post Listing->/post, Sign In->/sign-in
Mobile bottom nav renders on mobile with 5 tabs all linking to real pages
No fake/mock product data anywhere in the codebase
Every button either navigates somewhere, opens a modal/sheet, or shows a toast notification
pnpm build completes successfully with zero errors
verification: Run: cd /projects/sandbox/Khmer-Store && pnpm build - must complete with exit code 0
Run: grep -r 'mockProducts\|mockProduct\|fakeData\|fake_data\|placeholder.*product' src/ - must return empty (no fake data)
Run: grep -rn 'href="/collections\|href="/sellers\|href="/careers\|href="/press\|href="/help\|href="/safety\|href="/cookies' src/ - must return empty (no dead links to removed pages)
findings: Build passes cleanly with zero errors. Lint has only 2 warnings about using instead of next/image which is expected for user-uploaded content. The Facebook icon does not exist in lucide-react v1.17.0, so Globe icon was used for the social link instead. All 15 routes render correctly as shown in the build output. No fake data or dead links remain in the codebase. The marketplace page uses useSearchParams from next/navigation as a client component for filter state management.
